## What changed?

Describe your changes in a few sentences.

## Why?

Explain the problem this solves or the improvement this adds.

## How did you test it?

- [ ] I ran `npm run verify`
- [ ] I ran the app with `npm start`
- [ ] I tested the changed page or feature manually
- [ ] I added screenshots for UI changes

## Screenshots

Add screenshots here if this pull request changes the UI.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing project style
- [ ] I kept the change focused
- [ ] I did not commit `node_modules/` or `release/`
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
